data.title: Coinbase CEO envisions platform as bank replacement super app
data.description:
20-9-2025 – Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong has revealed ambitions to evolve the exchange into a full-fledged crypto super app capable of supplanting traditional banks. In an interview with Fox Business, Armstrong detailed plans for a suite of services including payments, credit cards offering 4% Bitcoin rewards, and other financial tools built on blockchain infrastructure. He [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/coinbase-ceo-envisions-platform-as-bank-replacement-super-app/

data.title: FTX Will Hand Out $1.6 Billion In Bankruptcy Repayments This Month
data.description:
FTX creditors will receive $1. 6 billion from the now-defunct crypto exchange’s estate as the third wave of payouts takes place on September 30 as part of its ongoing Chapter 11 reorganization process, the FTX Recovery Trust announced Friday. FTX Initiates Third Round Of Payments To Its Creditors Both the exchange’s convenience and non-convenience classes will […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/ftx-will-hand-out-1-6-billion-in-bankruptcy-repayments-this-month/

data.title: Japan’s Koizumi vows new economic plan, targets ¥1M wage boost in 5 years
data.description:
Shinjiro Koizumi, the reform-minded candidate seeking to lead Japan’s ruling party, laid it all out on Saturday in Tokyo that he plans to raise average wages by ¥1 million in five years. That’s $6,760 more in annual pay for workers across the country. Koizumi said the plan would kick off immediately after taking office, and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japans-koizumi-targets-%c2%a51m-wage-boost/

data.title: BitTreasury expands Bitcoin reserves to 1,111 BTC
data.description:
20-9-2025 – BitTreasury has purchased 111 more Bitcoin, increasing its corporate holdings to a total of 1,111 BTC. The addition positions the company at 43rd place among global Bitcoin treasury holders, according to ChainCatcher. Supported by investors including Winklevoss Capital and Nakamoto, BitTreasury’s strategy emphasizes Bitcoin as a core reserve asset, aligning with a broader shift [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bittreasury-expands-bitcoin-reserves-to-1111-btc/

data.title: Coinbase CEO: Coinbase will be built into a financial super application to replace traditional banks
data.description: In an interview with Fox Business, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong confirmed the company's vision of building Coinbase into a full-service crypto "super app" that replaces traditional banks. The company plans to offer a full suite of financial services, from payments to credit cards and rewards, all powered by crypto. "Yes, we do want to be a super app that offers a wide range of financial services, and I think cryptocurrency has the right to do that," he said.

data.title: Gensler is back from regulatory purgatory to attack crypto
data.description:
Gary Gensler, the former SEC chairman, who is mainly known as a villain in the crypto community, is back to give explanations on his governance. However, those who were waiting for an apology met a big surprise when the former regulatory chief’s tone implied that “I am proud of what we did. ” In an interview, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gensler-back-from-purgatory-to-attack-crypto/

data.title: A whale spent 2 million USDT to buy 1.825 million ASTER
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale spent 2 million USDT to buy 1.825 million ASTER in the past hour, with an average purchase price of $1.1. The whale also borrowed an additional 2 million USDT from Aave and deposited it in Aster, and may buy more ASTER.

data.title: A crypto KOL withdrew 5.57 million ASTER tokens worth $6.7 million 2 hours ago
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a crypto KOL (@CookerFlips, founder of Pastel Alphac) withdrew 5.57 million ASTER tokens worth $6.7 million 2 hours ago, making a profit of more than $5 million in just 3 days.

data.title: Watchdog Labels Trump’s Crypto Venture ‘American Sell-Out’ for Alleged North Korea, Iran Token Sales
data.description:
Government watchdog Accountable. US accused President Trump's World Liberty Financial crypto venture of selling tokens to entities linked to North Korea, Iran, and sanctioned money-laundering platforms in a report titled "American Sell-Out. "
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/watchdog-labels-trump-crypto-venture-american-sell-out-for-alleged-north-korea-iran-token-sales/

data.title: Michael Saylor Says Bitcoin May Go ‘Boring’ as Institutional Money Kills Volatility
data.description:
MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor warned that Bitcoin's growing institutional adoption could transform the volatile asset into a "boring" store of value as corporate treasuries reached a record 1. 011 million BTC worth over $118 billion.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/michael-saylor-says-bitcoin-may-go-boring-as-institutional-money-kills-volatility/
